title: The Greenhouse Effect Explained
script_summary: Explore how greenhouse gases keep Earth warm and why it matters.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you invisible gases are saving our planet?
Earth isn’t just a frozen rock, thanks to the greenhouse effect.
Gases like CO2 and methane trap heat, creating a blanket around our planet.
Without this, Earth would be too cold for life as we know it!
But too much of these gases leads to climate change. Balance is key.
Curious about how you can help? Like and follow for more science insights!
